what: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table

title: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table
Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table
text: df (Tibble/DataFrame) data frame interest var (String) Name outcome variable arm (String) Name primary treatment variable (factor variable) primary interest covariates (Vector Strings) vector covariates adjustment ... Additional arguments passed lm function

title: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table
Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table
text: function fit linear model form var ~ arm + covariates, table LS means per strata arm, well means standard deviations primary outcome var stratified arm. p-value ANOVA p-value associated arm, since arm might multiple levels.

title: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — quick_lm_ancova_table
